## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] This PR is focused on a single change and avoids unrelated cleanup.
- [ ] I ran `npm run format`.
- [ ] I ran relevant validation locally, such as `npm run test`, or a targeted build.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed, or explained why tests were not needed.
- [ ] I updated docs, screenshots, or setup notes when user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] I called out any breaking changes, migrations, or security-sensitive changes.
- [ ] I am not including secrets, credentials, or unrelated generated files.
